swahili.skip_count_overlay_column_of_running_t: Tabaka la kuhesabu kwa kuruka (safu wima ya jumla zinazoendelea)
swahili.same_dots_just_turned_sideways_learn_o: Nukta zilezile, zimegeuzwa tu kando. Jifunze ukweli mmoja, ujue mbili.
swahili.this_is_one_of_the_tricky_15_facts_the: Hii ni mojawapo ya ukweli 15 mgumu — kundi dogo linalohitaji kukariri kwa kweli. Nenda kwenye hali ya Mazoezi → «15 Ngumu» ili kuufanyia mazoezi.
swahili.same_numbers_four_faces_knowing_one_fa: Nambari zilezile, nyuso nne. Kujua ukweli mmoja kunakupa zingine.
swahili.9s_digits_sum_to_9: Katika vizidisho vya 9, jumla ya tarakimu ni 9
swahili.pick_a_pattern_to_highlight_the_table_: 🔍 Chagua muundo wa kuangazia. Jedwali limejaa muundo: ukishauona, nusu ya ukweli unakuwa wa kutabirika.
swahili.multiplication_table_with_pattern_high: Jedwali la kuzidisha lenye uangaziaji wa muundo
swahili.click_any_pattern_above_to_light_up_th: 👆 Bofya muundo wowote hapo juu ili kuwasha visanduku na kusoma kanuni. Miundo kadhaa inaweza kuingiliana (mfano, 5×5 ni «kizidisho cha 5» na pia «mraba kamili»).
swahili.why_patterns_beat_brute_memorization: 💡 Kwa nini miundo hushinda kukariri kwa nguvu
swahili.you_only_need_to_memorize_about_a_thir: Unahitaji kukariri takriban theluthi moja tu ya jedwali.
swahili.anything_in_the_1s_2s_5s_10s_11s_colum: Chochote katika safu wima za 1, 2, 5, 10 na 11 kina kanuni rahisi. Mraba ni kundi dogo (ukweli 12). Kinachobaki ni «katikati ngumu» — takriban ukweli 15 — kinachohitaji kukariri kwa kweli: 6×7, 6×8, 6×9, 7×8, 7×9, 8×9 na mapacha yao.
swahili.distributive_shortcut_for_the_tricky_m: Njia ya mkato ya ugawaji kwa katikati ngumu.
swahili.forget_7_8_7_8_5_8_2_8_40_16_56_build_: Umesahau 7×8? 7×8 = 5×8 + 2×8 = 40 + 16 = 56. Jenga ukweli mgumu kutoka kwa rahisi mbili. Baada ya kurudia vya kutosha, jibu huwa la kiotomatiki.
swahili.visualizing_each_fact_as_an_area_model: Kuonyesha kila ukweli kama mstatili wa modeli ya eneo (kichupo cha Picha) au kama muundo (kichupo hiki) hukupa njia ya kufikia jibu isiyohitaji kumbukumbu ya kiotomatiki. Kumbukumbu hujengwa kwa wakati, lakini si kwa mazoezi ya kimitambo pekee.
swahili.each_cell_a_multiplication_fact_color_: Kila kisanduku = ukweli mmoja wa kuzidisha. Rangi = umahiri wako hadi sasa. Bofya kisanduku chochote ili kufanya mazoezi ya ukweli huo.
swahili.fact_family_same_numbers_four_faces: 👨‍👩‍👧 Familia ya ukweli — nambari zilezile, nyuso nne
swahili.sliders_for_mastery_threshold_and_sele: Vitelezi vya kizingiti cha umahiri na kigawe kilichochaguliwa. Matokeo tofauti ya hali 3. Hakuna alama, hakuna ufunuo.
swahili.hypothesis_how_does_threshold_change_f: Dhana: kizingiti hubadilishaje maoni kwa wanafunzi wanaohangaika?
swahili.explain_mastery_learning_thresholds: Eleza vizingiti vya kujifunza kwa umahiri.
swahili.design_note_discrete_3_state_mastery_m: Dokezo la muundo: alama ya umahiri tofauti ya hali 3; hakuna alama ghafi; hakuna ufunuo — kwa makusudi.

somali.same_dots_just_turned_sideways_learn_o: Dhibcaha isku midka ah, kaliya dhinac loo rogay. Baro hal xaqiiqo, ogow laba.
somali.this_is_one_of_the_tricky_15_facts_the: Tani waa mid ka mid ah 15-ka xaqiiqo ee adag — koox yar oo u baahan xafidaad dhab ah. U gudub habka Tababar → «15-ka Adag» si aad u tababarto.
somali.same_numbers_four_faces_knowing_one_fa: Tirooyinka isku midka ah, afar waji. Ogaanshaha hal xaqiiqo ayaa ku siinaya kuwa kale.
somali.pick_a_pattern_to_highlight_the_table_: 🔍 Dooro qaab aad iftiimiso. Jadwalku wuxuu ka buuxaa qaab-dhismeed: marka aad aragto, kala badh xaqiiqooyinka ayaa la saadaalin karaa.
somali.multiplication_table_with_pattern_high: Jadwalka isku-dhufashada oo leh iftiiminta qaabka
somali.click_any_pattern_above_to_light_up_th: 👆 Guji qaab kasta oo kor ku yaal si aad u iftiimiso unugyada oo aad u akhrido qaanuunka. Qaabab badan ayaa is-dul saari kara (tusaale, 5×5 waa «laba-jibbaaran 5» iyo «laba-jibbaaran sax ah» labadaba).
somali.why_patterns_beat_brute_memorization: 💡 Sababta qaababku uga fiican yihiin xafidaadda xoogga
somali.you_only_need_to_memorize_about_a_thir: Waxaad u baahan tahay inaad xafiddo kaliya saddex-meelood meel jadwalka.
somali.anything_in_the_1s_2s_5s_10s_11s_colum: Wax kasta oo ku jira tiirarka 1, 2, 5, 10 iyo 11 waxay leeyihiin qaanuun fudud. Laba-jibbaarradu waa koox yar (12 xaqiiqo). Waxa hadhaya waa «dhexda adag» — qiyaastii 15 xaqiiqo — oo u baahan xafidaad dhab ah: 6×7, 6×8, 6×9, 7×8, 7×9, 8×9 iyo mataanahooda.
somali.distributive_shortcut_for_the_tricky_m: Jid-gaaban qaybineed oo loogu talagalay dhexda adag.
somali.forget_7_8_7_8_5_8_2_8_40_16_56_build_: Ma ilowday 7×8? 7×8 = 5×8 + 2×8 = 40 + 16 = 56. Ka dhis xaqiiqada adag laba xaqiiqo oo fudud. Ku celcelin ku filan ka dib, jawaabtu waxay noqonaysaa mid otomaatig ah.
somali.visualizing_each_fact_as_an_area_model: Sawiridda xaqiiqo kasta sida leydi nooca bedka (tab-ka Muuqaalka) ama qaab (tab-kan) waxay ku siinaysaa jid loo maro jawaabta oo aan u baahnayn xusuusin otomaatig ah. Xusuusinta waxay ku dhistaa waqti ka dib, laakiin maaha tababar makaanikada keliya.
somali.each_cell_a_multiplication_fact_color_: Unug kasta = hal xaqiiqo isku-dhufasho. Midabka = xirfaddaada ilaa hadda. Guji unug kasta si aad u tababarto xaqiiqadaas.
somali.fact_family_same_numbers_four_faces: 👨‍👩‍👧 Qoyska xaqiiqada — tirooyinka isku midka ah, afar waji
somali.sliders_for_mastery_threshold_and_sele: Sliders-ka heerka xirfadda iyo factor-ka la doortay. Natiijo gooni ah oo 3-xaaladood. Dhibco ma jiraan, daahfur ma jiro.
somali.hypothesis_how_does_threshold_change_f: Mala-awaal: heerku sidee u beddelaa jawaab-celinta ardayda dhibaataysan?
somali.what_if_mastery_100_what_gets_praised: Ka warran haddii xirfaddu = 100%? Maxaa la ammaanaa?
somali.design_note_discrete_3_state_mastery_m: Qoraal naqshadeed: calaamad xirfad oo gooni ah oo 3-xaaladood; dhibco cayriin ma jiraan; daahfur ma jiro — ula kac.

kinyarwanda.skip_count_overlay_column_of_running_t: Urwego rwo kubara usimbuka (inkingi y'imibare iteranya igenda)
kinyarwanda.same_dots_just_turned_sideways_learn_o: Utudomo tumwe, twahinduwe gusa ku ruhande. Wiga ukuri kumwe, umenya kabiri.
kinyarwanda.this_is_one_of_the_tricky_15_facts_the: Iyi ni imwe mu kuri 15 gukomeye — itsinda rito risaba kwiga ku mutwe by'ukuri. Jya mu buryo bwo Kwitoza → «15 Bikomeye» kugira ngo ubyitoze.
kinyarwanda.same_numbers_four_faces_knowing_one_fa: Imibare imwe, mu maso ane. Kumenya ukuri kumwe biguha ibindi.
kinyarwanda.9s_digits_sum_to_9: Mu mibare ya 9, imibare iteranya ni 9
kinyarwanda.pick_a_pattern_to_highlight_the_table_: 🔍 Hitamo ishusho yo kugaragaza. Imbonerahamwe yuzuyemo imiterere: igihe uyibonye, kimwe cya kabiri cy'ukuri kiba gihanurwa.
kinyarwanda.multiplication_table_with_pattern_high: Imbonerahamwe yo kugwiza ifite kugaragaza ishusho
kinyarwanda.click_any_pattern_above_to_light_up_th: 👆 Kanda ishusho iyo ari yo yose hejuru kugira ngo umurikire utuyobora kandi usome amategeko. Amashusho menshi ashobora kwisumbirana (urugero, 5×5 ni «umugwizo wa 5» kandi «kare yuzuye»).
kinyarwanda.why_patterns_beat_brute_memorization: 💡 Impamvu amashusho aruta kwiga ku mutwe ku gahato
kinyarwanda.you_only_need_to_memorize_about_a_thir: Ukeneye kwiga ku mutwe gusa hafi kimwe cya gatatu cy'imbonerahamwe.
kinyarwanda.anything_in_the_1s_2s_5s_10s_11s_colum: Ikintu cyose kiri mu nkingi za 1, 2, 5, 10 na 11 gifite itegeko ryoroshye. Kare ni itsinda rito (ukuri 12). Ibisigaye ni «hagati hakomeye» — hafi ukuri 15 — gusaba kwiga ku mutwe by'ukuri: 6×7, 6×8, 6×9, 7×8, 7×9, 8×9 n'impanga zabyo.
kinyarwanda.distributive_shortcut_for_the_tricky_m: Inzira ngufi y'ikwirakwiza ku hagati hakomeye.
kinyarwanda.forget_7_8_7_8_5_8_2_8_40_16_56_build_: Wibagiwe 7×8? 7×8 = 5×8 + 2×8 = 40 + 16 = 56. Ubaka ukuri gukomeye uhereye ku byoroshye bibiri. Nyuma yo gusubiramo bihagije, igisubizo kiba cyikora.
kinyarwanda.visualizing_each_fact_as_an_area_model: Kwerekana buri kuri nk'urukiramende rw'icyitegererezo cy'ubuso (igika cy'Ishusho) cyangwa nk'ishusho (iki gika) bikuha inzira igana ku gisubizo itagomba kwibuka byikoresha. Kwibuka kubakwa mu gihe, ariko ntibibaho gusa binyuze mu myitozo ya tekiniki.
kinyarwanda.each_cell_a_multiplication_fact_color_: Buri kayanga = ukuri kumwe ko kugwiza. Ibara = ubuhanga bwawe kugeza ubu. Kanda ku kayanga iyo ari ko kose kugira ngo witoze uko kuri.
kinyarwanda.fact_family_same_numbers_four_faces: 👨‍👩‍👧 Umuryango w'ukuri — imibare imwe, mu maso ane
kinyarwanda.sliders_for_mastery_threshold_and_sele: Utugende tw'urwego rw'ubuhanga n'umubare-shingiro watoranyijwe. Igisubizo gitandukanye cy'imimerere 3. Nta manota, nta guhishura.
kinyarwanda.hypothesis_how_does_threshold_change_f: Igitekerezo: urwego ruhindura gute inama ku banyeshuri bahanganira?
kinyarwanda.what_if_mastery_100_what_gets_praised: Bite niba ubuhanga = 100%? Ni iki gishimirwa?
kinyarwanda.how_does_color_coding_affect_motivatio: Gukoresha amabara bigira ingaruka ki ku kwishimira?
kinyarwanda.explain_mastery_learning_thresholds: Sobanura inzego z'kwiga gushingiye ku buhanga.
kinyarwanda.design_note_discrete_3_state_mastery_m: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso cy'ubuhanga gitandukanye cy'imimerere 3; nta manota mabisi; nta guhishura — ku bushake.
